titleStmt.title: SII 25.217: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 217. (A.R. No. 217 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra of the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This inscription furnishes the details of date viz., Regnal year 12, Kaṉṉi śu 3, Monday and Hasta-nakshatra.

It records a deed of agreement issued by the peruṅguṟi-mahāsabhai to the Ādichaṇḍēśvaradēvakaṉmigaḷ of the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉamuḍaiya-ṉāyaṉār of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu for the lands granted as iṟaiyili, to provide for the food-offerings to the deity Nambi- viṉāyakap-piḷḷaiyār set up in the tirumaḍai-viḷāgam in the temple. Among the boundaries of the lands endowed as tax-free, mention may be made of the highway of Vikramaśōḻanallūr, lands called Kulōttuṅgaśōḻabrahmārāyaṉ, Sembiyaṉ-brahmārāyaṉ, etc. The deed was signed by Kōmaḷattu Nīlagiriyaṉ, Eṭṭukkūr Sūriyadēva-baṭṭaṉ and several others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 12 vatu kaṉṉiṉāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu tritiyaiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ rājendra coḻavaḷa
ṉāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭup piramatecam Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷa kulācaṉic caruppetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭeśvara tevar kaṉmikaḷukku Ivvūr pe
ruṅkuṟimācapaiyom Iṟaiyilippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Iṉṉāyaṉār koyil tirumaṭai viḷākattu Eḻuntaruḷi Irukkiṟa nampi viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikkuṭalāka mutalaṭaṅka
Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilam Ūril vaṭamiruṅku muṉṉūṟṟuvaṉ peruvaḻikku meṟku Ipperuvaḻiyiṉiṉṟum meṟku nokki vikkiramacoḻanallūr Ellaiyiṟ peruvaḻikku kkayac cevakkaṇa
ttu ta rc cempiyaṉ piramārāyaṉ nilamāy Ivarpāvattuk kulottuṅka coḻappiramārāyaṉ rūpāy �¿ 1muntiri kiḻakku (1/2) Iṉṉilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraikkā kiḻpā
ṟkku Ellaiyil Uṭaiyār tiruucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉattukku meṟkkum Itaṉ
tevatāṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkku Ellai �ca vā kum Āka Icainta Iṉnāṉkellai Uṭppaṭṭa nilam mukkāṇi yum Iṉṉi
lamum Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttavuḷḷam ttuk kiḻak kaṭai taṭi 3 viṭṭu Itaṉ meṟkku tiru yaka paṭṭaṉ rūpāy � ¿ 1muntiri kiḻakku (1/2) I tirikai
k kiḻarai Itaṉ meṟkkuppārta cempiyaṉ piramārāyaṉ nilamāy Iv Apāvattu ttuṅka coḻap piramārāya raik kā
ṇikkiḻkkālum teṉ meṟkku Etirilicoḻaṉ Iḷaiyarrāṉa ṉ rūpāy Orumā ¿ 1muntiri kiḻakku (1/2) Iṉṉilam Orumā Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻ raiyum muṉṟumā Uṭaiyār tiru Ucāttāṉa mu
ṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉam kuṭi niṅkā ṉ nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkku Ellai nārācavarampukku vaṭakkum kku coḻappiramārāyaṉ Āṟṟukku teṟkkum Āka Icanta Iṉṉā
ṉ (k)ku Ellaikku Uḷpaṭṭa nilam muṉṟumā kiḻ nāraiyum Āka Iṉṉila nālumā Inayaṉāṟkku peruṅ kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum pākamum
pākāśrayamum maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭaṉa Uri� paṭa mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom l Ēṟṟi Iṟukka kaṭavo muntirikai kiḻ nālumā Araiyum
Iṉṉāyaṉāṟkku Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭi kuṭalāka cantrātittavaraiyum camanta kuṭuttom Iṉṉilam nālu raiyum kaiyile kalveṭṭik koḷḷak kaṭavatāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom
Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya ṉāyaṉāṟku peruṅkuṟi mācapaiyom Ippaṭikku Ivai ca paṭikku ṭukku kaḷattūr kovaṉ Eṉṟu ko
maṭattu nilakkiriyaṉ‘Read as nilaṅkiriyaṉ ’ ṉum tiruccempiya paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum pārattuvāji Iḷaiya nārāyaṇa paṭṭa Āvuṭaiyā perumāḷ paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟu
m sajñaiyāṉamaikku cākkāṉa muṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum Eṭṭukkūr cūriyateva paṭṭaṉe kuṭavūr tiruciṟṟampala muṭaiyā
ṉ paṭṭarum sajñaiāṉamaikkum Ippaṭi Ākaveṉum kommāra cūriyateva paṭṭaṉeḻuttu Eṉṟum marutavetiya paṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Eṉṟum cātaṉam Eḻutip pukuṉtatu
Digital edition of SII 25.217 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
